svg.text: Apache Airflow · Apache Spark · Ollama gemma2:2b · GKE
💰 ~$60 total PoC cost · no GPU required
Engineer greps logs, checks metrics, reads stack traces — often at 3AM
📉 High MTTR stalls downstream BI & reporting
No intelligent context — just raw errors with no fix guidance or prioritisation
🔕 Silent DAG drift — SLA breaches before anyone notices
Gradual slowdown goes undetected; no proactive alerting on baseline deviation
✅ Engineer receives root cause + exact fix steps in their inbox within 30 seconds — before they open a terminal
🔒 Zero External API Calls — All LLM inference inside cluster · ClusterIP only · No internet egress · Mirrors GDC air-gapped pattern exactly

Airflow 2.9.2 (KubernetesExecutor · Helm) · Spark 3.5 (Operator · Ephemeral) · Ollama + gemma2:2b (CPU · ClusterIP · 1.6 GB) · GKE Standard (Spot · e2-standard-4) · PostgreSQL · Prometheus + Grafana · Python 3.11 · Helm 3
Enterprise-Ready — Architecturally identical to GDC production deployment
Same Helm chart · Same KubernetesExecutor · Same ephemeral Spark pattern · Lift-and-shift to on-prem GDC by updating endpoint URLs only
AI-Powered Pipeline Intelligence PoC · Apache Airflow + Spark + Ollama LLM · Internal use · GKE (Personal GCP) · 2026
